message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Please confirm identity by providing the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.

Identity verified. I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Your account ending ****1184 is identified with a current amount due of 8400. You stated you cannot pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I’m unemployed right now and can’t commit to a payment.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.
Handoff

structured_payload.summary: Disclosure completed: AI agent acting on behalf of Slice; conversation logged. Verification completed using borrower profile/phone ending 02. Debt established: Slice account ending ****1184, amount due 8400. Borrower stated they are unemployed, cannot commit to a payment, and do not expect any income in the next 21 days. Hardship signal recorded: unemployment/no income. Required hardship timing question asked and answered. No stop-contact request. Next stage should not repeat identity verification, debt establishment, or the 21-day income question. Next priority: hardship review / next-step discussion by phone.
